name: Linear
api_notes: Linear provides a comprehensive GraphQL API that supports both querying and mutation of virtually all entities in the workspace, including support for AI agent integrations.
access_notes: Developers can create personal API keys within their own Linear account via the settings menu without needing approval or a paid plan. Admin settings can control whether members create keys, but self-serve access is supported.
one_liner: Linear is a project management and issue tracking platform purpose-built for software development teams.

evidence.claim: Linear's public API is built using GraphQL and allows for both querying and mutating entities.
Authentication is supported via OAuth 2.0 or personal API keys.
Developers can generate API keys directly from their workspace settings.
Search citation: Linear – The system for product development

auth_notes: Linear supports both personal API keys for individual access and OAuth 2.0 for third-party application integrations.
mcp_notes: While the product mentions "MCP support" in promotional contexts, there is no evidence of an official or community Model Context Protocol server explicitly provided by the vendor at this time; it appears to be a feature of the Linear Agent product.
